policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="rawRequestBody" value="@(context.Request.Body != null ? context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true) : string.Empty)" />
@($"[Inbound Spotify API] {context.Request.Method} {context.Request.Url}")
policies.outbound:
<set-variable name="responseBody" value="@{
            return context.Response.Body != null ? context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true) : "";
        }" />
        
            @($"[Outbound SpotifyAPI] {context.Response.StatusCode} {context.Request.Method} {context.Request.Url}")
